payload.title: Empty catch-all lanes still render in swimlane view
payload.description: When grouped by epic, the '(no epic)' or 'Random Bugs' lane appears even when it has 0 tickets — visible in the screenshot for SCP-50's verification. Root cause: buildLanes calls ensure() before checking whether the ticket's status is in BOARD_COLUMNS, so tickets with status='cancelled' create a lane but never get bucketed into it. Fix: only call ensure() after confirming the status is one of BOARD_COLUMNS, OR filter empty catch-all lanes out at the end of buildLanes.
